body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/trace-code/import 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/trace-code/import 
 ## 接口描述 
将追溯码导入医招智付-追溯码台账中，医招智付会调取阿里码上放心接口解析追溯码信息。

注意：
1. 单次最大导入上限为80条；
2. 导入的追溯码长度只能为20位；
3. 导入前，请先在医招智付中配置阿里码上放心授权信息。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterprise","required":true,"maxLength":"200","label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8D%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%8D%8E%E5%8C%97%E5%8C%BB%E8%8D%AF%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E8%B4%A3%E4%BB%BB%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22","desc":"%20%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%9C%A8%E9%98%BF%E9%87%8C%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8A%E6%94%BE%E5%BF%83%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%B3%A8%E5%86%8C%E7%9A%84ID%EF%BC%8C%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%B8%8E%E9%98%BF%E9%87%8C%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8A%E6%94%BE%E5%BF%83%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%B3%A8%E5%86%8C%E7%9A%84%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"traceCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%5B%2284004560440850000177%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%BA20%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA80%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%B4%E6%8E%A5%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E2%80%9C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9D%E3%80%82","maxLength":"80"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"maxLength":"","label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"message","label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%AE%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%9A%E2%80%9D%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9C%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"body","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%22%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%22%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{  
    "deliverEnterprise": "泉州鹭燕医药有限公司",  
    "traceCodeList": [  
        "84004560440850000177"  
    ]  
}  
```
### 响应报文
```json
{  
    "body":"追溯码导入成功",  
    "returnCode":"SUC0000",  
    "success":true",  
    "message":"成功"  
}  
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | E0002| 配送企业名称不能为空| 传入配送企业名称|
  | E0002| 输入正确格式的20位追溯码| 输入正确的追溯码|
  | E0002| 追溯码导入上限为80条| 调整单次导入追溯码数量|
  | E0002| 配送企业名称不可超过200个字符| 输入正确的配送企业名称|
  | EROOR1| 系统错误| 稍后再试，或联系开发人员|
  | EROOR2| 授权码为空，请在医招智付中维护授权信息| 在“医招智付-集采平台-规则设置-授权码”中维护正确的阿里授权信息|
  | EROOR2| 未找到对应码上放心供应商，请精准维护码上放心供应商全称| 输入的配送企业名称不正确或该企业尚未在阿里码上放心平台注册|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/trace-code/import

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/trace-code/import

接口描述

将追溯码导入医招智付-追溯码台账中，医招智付会调取阿里码上放心接口解析追溯码信息

注意：

  1. 单次最大导入上限为80条；
  2. 导入的追溯码长度只能为20位；
  3. 导入前，请先在医招智付中配置阿里码上放心授权信息。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterprise","required":true,"maxLength":"200","label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8D%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%8D%8E%E5%8C%97%E5%8C%BB%E8%8D%AF%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E8%B4%A3%E4%BB%BB%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22","desc":"%20%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%9C%A8%E9%98%BF%E9%87%8C%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8A%E6%94%BE%E5%BF%83%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%B3%A8%E5%86%8C%E7%9A%84ID%EF%BC%8C%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%B8%8E%E9%98%BF%E9%87%8C%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8A%E6%94%BE%E5%BF%83%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%B3%A8%E5%86%8C%E7%9A%84%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"traceCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%5B%2284004560440850000177%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%BA20%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA80%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%B4%E6%8E%A5%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E2%80%9C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9D%E3%80%82","maxLength":"80"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"maxLength":"","label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"message","label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%AE%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%9A%E2%80%9D%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9C%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"body","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%22%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%22%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

  1. {    

  2.     "deliverEnterprise": "泉州鹭燕医药有限公司",    

  3.     "traceCodeList": [    

  4.         "84004560440850000177"    

  5.     ]    

  6. }  

  7.

响应报文

  1. {    

  2.     "body":"追溯码导入cheng'g",    

  3.     "returnCode":"SUC0000",    

  4.     "success":true",    

  5.     "message":"成功"    

  6. }  

  7.

错误码说明

错误码错误信息解决方案
E0002配送企业名称不能为空传入配送企业名称
E0002输入正确格式的20位追溯码输入正确的追溯码
E0002追溯码导入上限为80条调整单次导入追溯码数量
E0002配送企业名称不可超过200个字符输入正确的配送企业名称
EROOR1系统错误稍后再试，或联系开发人员
EROOR2授权码为空，请在医招智付中维护授权信息在“医招智付-集采平台-规则设置-授权码”中维护正确的阿里授权信息
EROOR2未在阿里码上放心平台查到对应的配送企业输入的配送企业名称不正确或该企业尚未在阿里码上放心平台注册
body.menuLevelName: 开发文档/智能费控/医招智付/集采平台
